Site Launch

17/06/2013

It’s up! Oh the glory. My personal website that I’ve dreamt of for so long. Well sort of.

I didn’t really want to start on this site until I had gotten a new laptop, my old one (a 2008 MacBook Pro) didn’t handle all the tasks I wanted but now I’ve gotten a shiny MacBook Pro with a 15” retina display and I couldn’t be happier. What a beast!

I’ll put up a post soon with the information on what tools I’m using for the site and the design and development process I went through so stay tuned.
